patch.value: GH-191: test --add command parser should accept quoted commands containing --
Mirror GitHub issue #191. Improve parser handling and diagnostics for --add command values that contain nested '--' tokens so agent-generated commands are accepted reliably.

value.author: codex-active-pm-cycle-20260610
value.text: Source: GitHub issue https://github.com/unbraind/pm-cli/issues/191. Duplicate-check run (pm search test --add command parsing terms) found no open canonical item for this scope, so this issue captures that lineage.

value.author: codex-impl
value.text: Post-merge note: PR #198 added robust --add-json linked-test input, parser docs, and regression coverage for complex commands, which resolved GH-193. This item remains open because GH-191 specifically asks for the two-token form pm test <id> --add command "... -- ..." to be accepted or produce targeted syntax guidance; that exact UX remains intentionally unresolved.
